name: Bug report

**FILL OUT THIS FORM!**
If you do not fill out the form below, we cannot offer support. Please complete each section carefully.

**Error Message**
If you are reporting an error, please click "copy to clipboard" and paste here:



**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what the bug is. Attatch screenshots here if neccessary.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**

- OS (including distro): [e.g. Windows 11, Arch Linux]
- iloader version: [e.g. 2.0.6]
- Package Format: [e.g. msi, deb]

**Smartphone (please complete the following information):**

Please certify your device is:

- [ ] Is in developer mode
- [ ] Has a passcode set
- [ ] Is connected to your computer over USB

If any of those things are not true, please fix them and then try again before opening this issue.
  
- Phone Model: [e.g. iPhone 6]
- iOS version: [e.g. iOS 26.0]

**Apple Account (please complete the following information):**

- Do you have a paid or free Developer Account?: [if unsure, type free]
- Two-Factor Auth (2FA) type: [e.g Trusted Device, SMS, None (if unsure, most devices  Trusted Device)]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
